task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Nx Witness VMS server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening a web browser to https://localhost:7001, or using terminal commands (e.g., curl) or an API client to interact with the server at localhost:7001.
Screenshots show the setting 'sessionLimitMinutes' being changed to 15 in the VMS web interface, or included in an API request payload with the value 15.
Screenshots show the setting 'autoDiscoveryEnabled' being disabled (false) in the VMS web interface, or included in an API request payload with the value false.

task_completion.description: Agent configures trafficEncryptionForced to true and statisticsAllowed to false.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'trafficEncryptionForced' set to true and 'statisticsAllowed' set to false in the VMS web interface, or included in an API request payload with these values.
Screenshots show 'insecureDeprecatedApiEnabled' set to false in the VMS web interface, or included in an API request payload with the value false.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the security hardening report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or terminal commands creating a file at '/home/ga/security_hardening_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the summary of the changes made.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'security_hardening_report.txt' are visible and explicitly list the five configured settings (sessionLimitMinutes, autoDiscoveryEnabled, trafficEncryptionForced, statisticsAllowed, insecureDeprecatedApiEnabled) and their new values.

integrity.description: Agent actually configures the VMS server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must interact with the VMS server (via GUI or API) to apply the settings. It should not just write the report without making the actual system changes.

integrity.description: Agent creates the report based on actions taken.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file is manually typed or generated via script by the agent, not just copied from the task description without performing the task.

integrity.description: Agent authenticates using the provided credentials.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'admin' and 'Admin1234!' to log in to the web interface or includes them in API requests (e.g., basic auth or login endpoint).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nx Witness VMS server is running on https://localhost:7001. The credentials are admin / Admin1234!. The API endpoint /rest/v1/system/settings is typically used for system configuration. The report must be saved to /home/ga/security_hardening_report.txt. The required settings are: sessionLimitMinutes (15), autoDiscoveryEnabled (false), trafficEncryptionForced (true), statisticsAllowed (false), and insecureDeprecatedApiEnabled (false).
